scene.description: A warm indoor cafe in Yeosu at night, with a large window facing the sea. Sowoni is seated at a window table, slightly leaning, in quiet inward thought.
must_include: large window with night sea and sky view
single star visible through the window
city lights and warm indoor ambient light
Sowoni seated at the table, facing the window

forbidden: hand-held star or star in character's hands
face visible from front or side
hair style or color change from shoulder-length dark hair

star.position: visible through the window, in the night sky — NOT held by character
star.rule: star floats in sky outside the window. Never in hands, never on table surface.

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: shoulder-length dark hair, slim body, back view or slight 3/4 back only, no facial detail
character.pose: seated at window table — slightly leaning or resting posture, inward thinking. Never standing.
character.description: Sowoni sits quietly at a window table, slightly leaning forward, looking toward the single star visible through the glass.
character.rule: Sowoni must be present, seated. No star in hands. No mascot character.

composition.flow: Sowoni (seated) → table surface → window frame → dark sea → single star in sky
